Public Grievances and Pensions (Department of Personnel and Training) number G.S.R. 730(E). dated the 2nd May, 1986, namely I n the Schedule to the said notification, after serial No 3R and the entries relating thereto, the following serial nu m bers and entries shall be added. namely :---- S No. Name of the Corporation/ Society/other authority (I) (2) - 39.
